headline: IBM Expands AI Agents And Security Role With ElevenLabs And CrowdStrike
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) has partnered with ElevenLabs to bring secure, multilingual voice AI agents to enterprise clients through its watsonx Orchestrate platform. The collaboration aims to support natural language AI interactions in more than 70 languages for global businesses with strict compliance needs. IBM also expanded its partnership with CrowdStrike to deliver AI powered, autonomous threat detection and response across security and IT environments. Both developments align with IBM's ongoing...
